strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong engineering practices background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018)
No clear mention of Vitest, PostgreSQL, or major cloud platforms (AWS appears only briefly via CDK)
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong alignment with TypeScript/Node/React, and directly relevant AI-agent tooling experience from the current role. Gaps exist around the specific Nest.js framework, Vitest, and depth in Kotlin/cloud platforms, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated craftsmanship suggest these are learnable. Overall the profile fits the role's core needs well, with some secondary-stack uncertainty.
